remarks: Imagine being able to view one of the town's loveliest Formal Gardens, from huge windows, throughout this stunning Mid-Century Modern home....Nestled tranquilly on a park-like private cul de sac, in Westport's highly-sought Coleytown neighborhood. 8 Bayberry Ridge is minutes from the Merritt and multiple Train stations. Become a resident of the Westport, CT community! Enjoy its pristine Beaches, superb public Golf course, upscale shopping, and thriving cultural life. This home offers 3,300 SF of Open, High-Ceilinged and Light-Filled space. The Kitchen/Living Room, with its charming timber beams, is one of several distinct and unique interior environments--all seamlessly connecting with the spectacular, Four Season Garden views, creating a colorful and ever-changing visual display from inside the home. Indulge in the Great Room with soaring Cathedral ceilings. Unwind in the Solarium, or take a refreshing dip in the Indoor Pool--ideal for year-round relaxation, fitness, and entertaining. The modernized Kitchen is equipped with high-end appliances. Lounge on the comfortable Screened Porch, surrounded by lush Nature. Retreat to one of the three Bedrooms, each with its Full Bath. The Finished Lower Level features a sauna, and a mirrored wall for dance or exercise. Garage has an EV charger. Multiple Patios + a Screened Porch beckon as perfect Outdoor Living and Entertaining venues. This rental provides a peaceful sanctuary, with its blend of indoor and outdoor spaces.
